build_command: N/A - LaTeX compilation not required in sandbox
verification_instructions: Verify the LaTeX file is syntactically valid, contains all required chapters and sections, and has substantial scientific content in Indonesian.
setup_instructions: No setup required - this is a content generation task producing a single .tex file
environment_constraints: Large file generation - the textbook will be substantial. May need to be generated in parts due to output limits.
key_patterns: Standard LaTeX book class with chapters, sections, subsections. Indonesian language throughout. Scientific writing style with chemical formulas, equations, and academic terminology.
directory_structure: Simple single-file output in the repository root
